plugins.name: ask-claude-web
plugins.description: Two Claudes talk to each other — Claude Code asks claude.ai directly, gets answers, and acts on them

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Rich status bar for Claude Code — rate limits, context usage, git info, task progress, and more in a single HUD line

plugins.name: session-memory
plugins.description: Session-scoped keyword memory for Claude Code — save decisions, recall context after compaction, search across sessions

plugins.name: guard-claude-dir
plugins.description: Protects .claude/ directory from accidental modifications and prevents critical config file deletion
